name: EventHandler - ThrivingUnderPressure
description: Verify ThrivingUnderPressure EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Search for perk with ThrivingUnderPressure handler
steps.code: var found = false; var perks = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); foreach(var perkName in perks) { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", perkName, "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "ThrivingUnderPressure") { found = true; break; } } if(found) break; } } found

steps.name: Load EventHandlers from a specific perk
Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", "perk.steady_aim", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; break; } } } found

steps.name: Read RequiredStacksForUse parameter field from ThrivingUnderPressure
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", "perk.steady_aim", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "ThrivingUnderPressure") { var field = h.GetType().GetField("RequiredStacksForUse"); if(field != null) { found = true; break; } } } } found
